splitAudio.input.placeholderTitle: Import a file or drag it here
splitAudio.input.summary.default: Video and pure-audio inputs are supported. If you import a video, the main audio track is extracted automatically before separation starts.
splitAudio.input.summary.pendingValidati: The file was imported. The audio track will be validated again and normalized to WAV when separation starts.
splitAudio.input.summary.ready: {mediaType}, {duration}, {audioCodec}. The workflow normalizes the source to a temporary WAV before Demucs separates the four stems.
splitAudio.settings.description: FFmpeg still handles the final output format. Demucs only produces the intermediate four stems.
splitAudio.settings.outputDirectoryHint: Leave empty to export to the source file folder by default.
splitAudio.results.description: Each completed run outputs four result files using the original file name plus the stem name.
splitAudio.preview.unavailable.generic: Preview isn't available for the current file, but you can still continue separating audio.
splitAudio.preview.unavailable.withFileN: {fileName} was imported, but preview is temporarily unavailable. You can still continue separating audio.
splitAudio.status.ready: Import one audio or video file. The app normalizes the audio first, then calls Demucs to split it into four stems.
splitAudio.status.busy: A split-audio task is already running. Wait for it to finish or cancel it first.
splitAudio.status.noNewFiles: No new processable files were found.
splitAudio.status.noAudioTrack: The imported file doesn't contain a usable audio track, so it can't be separated.
splitAudio.status.importedFirstFromMulti: Split audio supports only one file per run. Imported the first processable file: {fileName}
splitAudio.status.importedReady: {fileName} was imported and is ready for separation.
splitAudio.status.outputDirectoryFailed: Failed to choose the output folder.
splitAudio.status.outputDirectoryCleared: Cleared the split-audio output folder. The source folder will be used when left empty.
splitAudio.status.revealFailed: Failed to reveal the output file. Check whether it still exists.
splitAudio.status.resultsCleared: Cleared the completed-runs list and removed {count} entries.
splitAudio.status.cancelled: The current split-audio task was cancelled.
splitAudio.status.acceleration.cpu: Switched to CPU compatibility mode. This run will stay on the CPU.
splitAudio.status.acceleration.gpuPrefer: Switched to GPU preferred mode. Separation will try discrete GPU -> integrated GPU -> CPU in order.
splitAudio.validation.noAudioTrack: {fileName} doesn't contain a usable audio track.
splitAudio.progress.detail.preparing: Validating the input and preparing the split-audio runtime...
splitAudio.progress.detail.strategy.cpu: CPU mode selected. Preparing the Demucs runtime...
splitAudio.progress.detail.strategy.gpuP: GPU preferred mode selected. Detecting discrete and integrated GPUs...
splitAudio.progress.detail.normalize.run: Extracting and normalizing the audio track...
splitAudio.progress.detail.demucs.runnin: Running Demucs to split the four stems...
splitAudio.progress.detail.demucs.comple: The four WAV stems are ready. Preparing export...
splitAudio.error.inputFileMissing: The input file for separation could not be found.
splitAudio.error.noAudioTrack: The current file doesn't contain a usable audio track, so separation can't continue.
splitAudio.error.normalizeFailed: Failed to normalize the input audio.
splitAudio.error.demucsProcessStartFaile: The Demucs process could not be started.
splitAudio.error.demucsRuntimeUnavailabl: The Demucs runtime isn't available. Check whether the offline runtime package is complete.
splitAudio.error.noExecutionPlan: No available Demucs execution plan was found.
splitAudio.error.noFallbackExecutionPlan: Demucs failed and no fallback execution plan is available.
splitAudio.error.inputDirectoryMissing: The input file doesn't have a valid folder.
splitAudio.error.invalidOutputDirectory: The output folder is invalid. Choose it again.
splitAudio.error.noFfmpegMessage: FFmpeg didn't return a usable error message.
splitAudio.executionPlan.cpu.direct: Using CPU separation now for maximum compatibility.
splitAudio.executionPlan.cpu.fallbackAft: GPU preferred mode was selected, but GPU runtime detection failed. Falling back to the CPU.
GPU preferred mode was selected, but no usable discrete or integrated GPU was found. Falling back to the CPU.
GPU preferred mode was selected, but GPU execution failed. Falling back to the CPU.
splitAudio.executionPlan.cuda.first: An NVIDIA discrete GPU was detected. Using CUDA for separation: {deviceName}.
splitAudio.executionPlan.cuda.retry: The previous NVIDIA GPU attempt failed. Switching to another NVIDIA GPU for separation: {deviceName}.
splitAudio.executionPlan.directml.afterC: CUDA on the discrete GPU failed. Falling back to the integrated GPU for separation: {deviceName}.
CUDA on the discrete GPU failed. Trying another DirectML device for separation: {deviceName}.
A discrete GPU was detected. Using DirectML for separation: {deviceName}.
No usable discrete GPU was found. Switching to the integrated GPU for separation: {deviceName}.
A usable GPU was detected. Using the DirectML device for separation: {deviceName}.
The previous GPU attempt failed. Switching to another discrete GPU for separation: {deviceName}.
The previous GPU attempt failed. Falling back to the integrated GPU for separation: {deviceName}.
The previous GPU attempt failed. Trying another GPU device for separation: {deviceName}.
splitAudio.planner.launcherMissing: The Demucs launcher script was not found: {path}
splitAudio.planner.probeStartFailed: The Demucs device-probe process failed to start: {probeCommand}
splitAudio.planner.probeFailed.exitCode: Demucs device probing failed with exit code {exitCode}: {probeCommand}
splitAudio.planner.probeFailed.detail: Demucs device probing failed with exit code {exitCode}: {probeCommand}. {detail}
splitAudio.planner.probeEmptyPayload: Demucs device probing returned an empty result: {probeCommand}
splitAudio.runtime.missingRuntimePackage: The offline Demucs {runtimeVariant} runtime package was not found. Please provide {packagePath}.
splitAudio.runtime.missingModelRepositor: The Demucs model repository was not found. Please provide {modelPath} or {archivePath}.
splitAudio.runtime.missingPythonExecutab: python.exe is missing from the Demucs runtime folder.
splitAudio.runtime.invalidRuntimePackage: python.exe is missing from the Demucs runtime package.
splitAudio.runtime.invalidModelPackage: The Demucs model package is missing the files required by htdemucs_ft.
